mappings.control_id: Downstream service credentials with excessive scope

mappings.control_name: Secure coding — ML pipeline output handling
mappings.notes: Implement secure coding practices for all code paths that consume LLM output; treat model responses as untrusted input to downstream systems

mappings.control_name: Review for security vulnerabilities — output validation
mappings.notes: Include output injection and unsafe rendering scenarios in pre-release security reviews; verify that output sanitisation controls are present and effective

mappings.control_name: Verify software integrity — model artifact integrity
mappings.notes: Verify that the model artifact serving output has not been tampered with; maintain signed model checksums and verify before deployment

mappings.control_name: Test for security vulnerabilities — output security
mappings.notes: Include output-based injection testing (XSS, SQLi, CMDi via LLM output) in adversarial test suites

mappings.control_name: Information Input Validation — output context validation
mappings.notes: Validate all LLM outputs before consumption by downstream systems; enforce output encoding, schema validation, and context-appropriate sanitisation

mappings.control_name: Malicious Code Protection — output channel scanning
mappings.notes: Extend malicious code protection to LLM output channels; detect and block injection payloads — XSS, SQL injection, command injection — in model responses before downstream delivery

mappings.control_name: Penetration Testing — LLM output consumer testing
mappings.notes: Include LLM output handling in penetration testing scope; test all downstream consumers for injection via model-generated content
Enforce boundary protection between LLM inference services and downstream consuming systems; apply output filtering and schema enforcement at the boundary

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — output validation controls
mappings.notes: Implement output sanitisation, encoding, and validation controls before LLM outputs reach downstream financial systems, APIs, or databases
Monitor LLM outputs for anomalous patterns indicating injection payloads, unexpected code fragments, or data exfiltration attempts

mappings.control_name: ICT Risk Management — output trust governance
mappings.notes: Define policies governing trust boundaries between LLM outputs and downstream systems; mandate validation at all integration points
Classify and report incidents where LLM outputs triggered downstream system compromise; include in major ICT incident reporting where applicable
